Requirement Name: Support campus SSO (OIDC/SAML) with local fallback.
Multi-factor authentication optional.
Role-based access control; assign multiple roles to an account.
Student can create and edit a rich profile (personal, academics, projects, links).
Resume upload (PDF/DOCX); store multiple versions; preserve original file and parsed JSON.
Canonical parsed resume schema must be produced for each uploaded resume.
Recruiter/TPO can create drives with roles, salary/stipend, location, mode (on-campus/remote), and multi-stage rounds.
Eligibility rules engine
Application windows with capacity, waitlist, and manual overrides.
Stage transitions with feedback capture and timestamps.
Offer creation, acceptance/rejection, appointment letter generation, and join-status tracking.
System provides ranked candidate lists for recruiters based on resume-JD matching score + test scores + configured weights.
Recruiter can enable anonymized (blind) shortlists.
In-app + email + configurable SMS for critical events (drive posted, shortlisted, interview scheduled, offer).
Notification preferences per user.
Aptitude test engine (timed tests, question pools, proctoring flag).
Coding judge integration (problems, auto-judge, plagiarism score).
Mock interview scheduling and recording (optional).
Produce structured resume fields (name, contact, education, experience, skills, projects, links).
Generate an ATS-compatibility score (formatting, headings, contact).
Compute semantic fit score between resume and JD (hybrid
Provide actionable suggestions (missing keywords, recommended sections, formatting fixes).
Maintain versions, diff view, and historical scores.
Generate per-student resource recommendations (courses, articles, practice sets) mapped to detected skill gaps.
Generate per-drive resource packs (company-specific interview kits).
Allow TPO/Faculty to curate and approve recommended resources.
Mentor matching (filters: expertise, availability, campus/alumni).
Booking slots, calendar sync (Google/Outlook), meeting links.
Funnel analytics (applies → shortlist → interview → offer) with cohort filtering.
KPIs: time-to-offer, acceptance rate, test pass rates, readiness score distribution.
Export reports (CSV/PDF) and scheduled email reports.
Per-drive consent capture and storage (timestamp, scope).
Student-controlled visibility toggles (opt-in for recruiter view).
DSAR flows: export/delete personal data on request.
Tenant configuration, branding, feature toggles.
Billing & subscription metadata (no payment gateway for MVP unless needed).
API & webhook endpoints for external integrations.
Immutable audit logs for critical actions.
Role/permission change history.
Admin console for monitoring security events.
(Performance): API p95 < 300ms for common read endpoints; resume parse end-to-end (upload → parsed JSON) < 5s (baseline).
(Scalability): Support up to 10k users for single-campus MVP; horizontal scaling possible.
(Availability): 99.5% uptime for core services during placement season.
(Security): TLS all traffic; encrypt sensitive fields at rest; secrets via KMS.
(Privacy): Data minimization; consent recorded and enforced; audit trail retention configurable.
(Maintainability): CI/CD pipelines; infra as code; automated tests for regression.
(Usability): Primary flows completeable in ≤5 steps; mobile-responsive; WCAG 2.1 AA baseline.
(ML constraints): Model inference latency <500ms; model explainability strings provided for top-3 features contributing to a prediction.
